positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic celestial stag silhouette, standing in a lunar forest clearing. The stag features intricate antlers interwoven with glowing nebulae patterns and crescent moons. The background should utilize deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant cosmic purple, contrasted sharply with crisp white linework and brilliant stardust accents. The style should blend modern neo-tribal art with mystical bioluminescent elements, designed with strong, clear silhouettes and high contrast suitable for screen printing. Central composition, perfect symmetry, isolated on a solid, textured black or deep midnight blue background. Art Deco meets Polynesian tattoo flash.
